description: Small labeled set for the A2.P2 multi_query=true recall-lift eval. Each query lists KNOWN-RELEVANT DOIs an ideal search should surface in the top-20. Every anchor was VERIFIED LIVE on 2026-06-11: it resolves to a real record AND its title is on-topic (discovered via keyword probes over the live fan-out, then title-checked). Anchors are bare-DOI to match the adapter's normalized r.doi. These queries lean toward topics where a SINGLE lexical phrasing tends to miss synonym-/framing-diverse records (e.g. 'phosphoproteomics' vs 'proteomics'; 'spatial memory' vs 'place cell dynamics') — multi-query fans out diverse rewrites then re-ranks vs the original. recall@20 is a RELATIVE lift signal (multi-query off vs on), not an absolute benchmark.

queries.query: hippocampal place cells spatial memory mouse
protein structure datasets for machine learning
